name: integration_ph_launch_murmur_practice_tough_phone
method: [PH LAUNCH] murmur: practice tough phone calls with AI before you make them

phases.name: research_and_spec
steps: scrape murmur PH page for feature list + reviews
identify target ICP (SDR teams, recruiters, anxious callers)
check app_factory_autopilot for similar existing apps

phases.name: build
steps: generate AI call practice web app via app_factory_command_center
wire claude -p as roleplay backend (free, Claude Max)

phases.name: distribute
steps: deploy to surge.sh under ai-call-practice or callcoach domain
generate 3 tweets + 1 thread about AI call practice (Rule 9)
add to PH outbound sequence via chain_cold_outbound targeting sales ops leads
